en: Rest in peace Twitch, also known as DJ Steven, Ellen's DJ, unalive to himself, he was only 40
years old. You would have never known that he was suffering from depression or mental illness
or whatever demons were on his back. It's so sad and unfortunate but it's much more common
than most think. If you've never experienced it, it may be difficult for you to understand
but sometimes you just want the pain to stop. If this is the case, please dial 9-1-1
or dial 9-8-8 which is the suicide hotline. Sometimes friends and family members may not
know what to say or do to help you but if you can find someone who will listen.
You guys remember to check on your strong friends.
